moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix at Silverstone
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix is taking place this weekend at Silverstone, with qualifying and the main race happening from July 3rd to 5th, 2026.

angles.name: Race Day Excitement
angles.copy: Engines roaring, the British Grand Prix is in full swing at Silverstone this weekend! Who are you backing for the podium?

angles.name: Local F1 Buzz
angles.copy: The roar of F1 is here! Silverstone is buzzing for the British Grand Prix this weekend. Are you trackside or watching from home?

moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 are ongoing, running from June 29 to July 12, with the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Finals scheduled for the final weekend.

angles.name: Centre Court Action
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon is heating up as we head into the second week and towards the finals. Who's your pick for the trophy?

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: The grass courts of Wimbledon are alive with incredible tennis! Catch all the action as the tournament builds to its thrilling conclusion.

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarter-Finals
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is progressing, with Quarter-Final matches likely to be played this weekend and early next week, building towards the Final on July 19th.

angles.name: World Cup Showdown
angles.copy: It's do-or-die in the FIFA World Cup 2026! The Quarter-Finals are here – which teams are you desperate to see make it through?

angles.name: Football Fever
angles.copy: The tension is building! The World Cup Quarter-Finals are set to deliver some epic football clashes. Get your predictions in now!

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold the Number 1 spot on the Official UK Singles Chart for a remarkable 15th nonconsecutive week with 'Rein Me In,' as the new chart is announced today.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Still reigning supreme! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is Number 1 on the Official UK Singles Chart for a massive 15th week. Have you streamed it today?

angles.name: New Chart Friday
angles.copy: New chart Friday! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still the ones to beat at Number 1. What else is new in the Official Singles Chart Top 40?

moments.title: Happy 31st Birthday, Post Malone!
moments.blurb: American singer, rapper, songwriter, and record producer Post Malone, known for hits like 'Circles' and 'Rockstar,' turns 31 today, July 4, 2026.

angles.name: Posty's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to the one and only Post Malone! What's your favourite Posty track to get the weekend started?

angles.name: Cheers to Post Malone
angles.copy: Raise a glass! It's Post Malone's 31st birthday today. From 'White Iverson' to his latest, which song defines him for you?

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday, 50 Cent!
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent, famous for 'In Da Club' and 'Candy Shop,' celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6, 2026.

angles.name: G-Unit General's Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday. What's the ultimate 50 Cent anthem you'll be blasting?

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Monday marks 50 Cent's 51st birthday! From 'Get Rich or Die Tryin'' to TV mogul, what's his biggest impact?

moments.title: Happy 86th Birthday, Ringo Starr!
moments.blurb: Legendary English musician, singer, songwriter, and actor Ringo Starr, best known as the drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7, 2026.

angles.name: Peace & Love for Ringo
angles.copy: Tomorrow, July 7th, is Ringo Starr's 86th birthday! Send your 'Peace and Love' wishes to the iconic Beatles drummer.

angles.name: Beatles Legend Birthday
angles.copy: He's got by with a little help from his friends, and on July 7th, Ringo Starr turns 86! What's your favourite Ringo vocal from The Beatles or his solo career?

moments.title: Happy 56th Birthday, Beck!
moments.blurb: American musician, singer, songwriter, and record producer Beck, known for his experimental and genre-blending music, turns 56 on July 8, 2026.

angles.name: Beck's Day
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the incredibly unique Beck on Wednesday! From 'Loser' to 'Odelay,' what's your favourite era of his music?

angles.name: Genre-Bending Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating the masterful Beck's 56th birthday this week! His sound is truly one-of-a-kind. What's the first Beck song that comes to mind?

moments.title: Happy 62nd Birthday, Courtney Love!
moments.blurb: American singer, guitarist, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, iconic frontwoman of Hole, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Queen Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the legendary Courtney Love on Thursday! What's your favourite Hole track or her most iconic moment?

angles.name: Grunge Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a fierce 62nd birthday to Courtney Love this week! A true icon of grunge and alternative rock. What's your top pick from her incredible career?

moments.title: Happy 46th Birthday, Jessica Simpson!
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and fashion designer Jessica Simpson, known for her pop hits and reality TV, turns 46 on July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Pop Princess Birthday
angles.copy: It's Jessica Simpson's 46th birthday on Friday! From 'I Wanna Love You Forever' to fashion mogul, what's her standout moment for you?

angles.name: Celebrating Jessica
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 46th Birthday to Jessica Simpson this Friday! What's your favourite track from the pop superstar?

moments.title: Happy 52nd Birthday, Lil' Kim!
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning American rapper, singer, songwriter, and model Lil' Kim, known as the 'Queen Bee,' celebrates her 52nd birthday on July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Queen Bee's B-Day
angles.copy: Saturday is Lil' Kim's 52nd birthday! Celebrate the Queen Bee by dropping your all-time favourite track from the hip-hop icon!

angles.name: Hip-Hop Royalty
angles.copy: Wishing a huge Happy 52nd Birthday to Lil' Kim this Saturday! A true pioneer who changed the game for female rappers. What's her most influential song?

moments.title: Happy 84th Birthday, Roger McGuinn!
moments.blurb: American musician Roger McGuinn, best known as the frontman and leader of The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday on July 13, 2026.

angles.name: Byrds Legend
angles.copy: Monday is Roger McGuinn's 84th birthday! The visionary behind The Byrds' iconic sound. What's your favourite Byrds track?

angles.name: Jingle-Jangle Genius
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to Roger McGuinn this Monday! The man who brought the jingle-jangle to rock. Celebrate with a Byrds classic!

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Start
moments.blurb: School summer holidays for many in England and Wales are set to begin around July 22nd, with some schools in Scotland already breaking up or having recently done so.

angles.name: Summer Break Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on for summer holidays! Schools across England and Wales break up around July 22nd. What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Freedom!
angles.copy: Freedom! For many, the school summer holidays are just around the corner, or have already begun in some parts of the UK. Best feeling ever?
